EXPLANATION: The paper "Mathematics without Numbers" by John G. Kemeny is a real, well-cited article published in the journal Daedalus in 1959. The automated checker appears to have incorrectly matched the title with a different academic work from 1993 by S. Shapiro and G. Hellman.
